title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Haddock
description: A simple and flavorful dish showcasing the delicate taste of Norwegian haddock. Serve with a side of soup for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Rinse the haddock fillets and pat dry with paper towels.
Season the haddock with salt and pepper.
Heat butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the haddock fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the breadcrumbs in a dry skillet over medium heat until lightly browned.
Serve the haddock with toasted breadcrumbs and a side of soup.
